scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => fs.existsSync(f) && fs.unlinkSync(f)); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; const execPath = (process.env.npm_execpath || '').toLowerCase(); const isPnpm = ua.startsWith('pnpm/') || execPath.includes('pnpm'); if (!isPnpm) { console.error('ERROR: Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
